target_question: Can the diagnosis recognize an upstream allocation or policy cause instead of blaming execution quality alone?

classification_basis.execution_only_diagnosis_is_insufficient: The runtime proof explicitly records allocation, policy, and resource evidence before the council review; a diagnosis that only blames downstream execution would ignore the declared cause surface.
classification_basis.upstream_allocation_signal: The council review rationale and diagnosis evidence refs both point to allocation-plan, policy-evaluation, and resource-claim artifacts as part of the credibility judgment.

expected_pass_condition: The diagnosis should name upstream allocation or policy evidence when explaining the remaining coverage gap.
expected_fail_condition: Any verdict that blames execution quality only, while ignoring the allocation-plan, policy-evaluation, and resource-claim evidence, should fail.
